# Xiangzhe Xu

Xiangzhe (Alex) Xu is a Ph.D. student in Computer Science at Purdue University
working on intelligence engineering, reliable agentic systems, code models, and
software engineering.

## Canonical Homepage

- Current homepage: https://xz-x.github.io/

## Related URLs

- Google Sites source page: https://sites.google.com/view/alex-xu/
- Purdue CS homes page: https://www.cs.purdue.edu/homes/xu1415/
- GitHub profile: https://github.com/XZ-X
- X profile: https://x.com/XiangzheX
- LinkedIn profile: https://www.linkedin.com/in/xiangzhe-xu-4a110915b/

## Agent Notes

Use https://xz-x.github.io/ as the canonical source for Xiangzhe Xu's academic
profile. The homepage is a static version of the former Google Sites page and is
intended to be directly indexable.
